test_cases.title: handleBridgeToolExecute routes to Worker and returns real result
test_cases.description: Verify tool execute request is routed to the correct Worker via RPC and the result is non-stub
steps: Verify PluginService sends RPC to Goal Worker
Verify response content is not stubbed '{ success: true }'
Verify response contains actual Goal plugin result

test_cases.title: handleBridgeToolExecute returns error for unknown tool
test_cases.description: Verify tool not found returns isError: true
steps: Verify response content contains 'Tool not found'

test_cases.title: handleBridgeToolExecute handles Worker crash
test_cases.description: Verify Worker crash during tool execution returns error
steps: Activate a plugin with a registered tool
Send bridge:tool_execute for that plugin's tool

test_cases.title: executeHooks runs handlers in priority order
test_cases.description: Verify hook handlers execute serially by priority (trusted before sandbox)
steps: Verify Handler A executes before Handler B

test_cases.title: executeHooks stops chain when handler blocks
test_cases.description: Verify blocked: true from a handler stops the chain
steps: Register Handler A that returns blocked: true
Verify Handler B is not invoked
Verify result has blocked: true and blockedBy

test_cases.title: executeHooks passes transformedContent through chain
test_cases.description: Verify content transformation propagates to next handler
steps: Register Handler B that reads context.data

test_cases.title: Plugin list WS message returns installed plugins
test_cases.description: Verify plugin.list returns Goal and Todo built-in plugins
steps: Verify response contains config.plugins with at least 2 entries
Verify Goal plugin has source: 'built-in' and status: 'active'

test_cases.title: sessionData cache returns value when bridge unavailable
test_cases.description: Verify local cache serves reads when pi bridge is down
steps: Verify value is in memory cache

test_cases.title: sessionData flushes dirty cache on deactivate
test_cases.description: Verify cache is flushed to bridge when plugin deactivates

test_cases.title: Hot reload detects file change and reactivates plugin
test_cases.description: Verify fs.watch triggers deactivate + activate on file change
steps: Verify plugin status went inactive then active

test_cases.title: Hot reload ignores built-in plugins
test_cases.description: Verify fs.watch does not watch resources/plugins/ directory
steps: Verify watchAndReload is not called for built-in plugin paths

test_cases.title: Bridge reconnects after pi restart
test_cases.description: Verify Bridge goes Disconnected → Syncing → Ready after pi restart
steps: Verify Bridge auto-syncs and reaches Ready

test_cases.title: Goal plugin create_tasks creates task list
test_cases.description: Verify Goal plugin handles create_tasks action correctly
steps: Verify sessionData.set called with correct structure

test_cases.title: Goal plugin complete_goal marks all tasks done
test_cases.description: Verify complete_goal action completes the goal
steps: Set up sessionData with 2 pending tasks

test_cases.title: Todo plugin add creates new todo items
test_cases.description: Verify Todo plugin handles add action
steps: Call add with texts: ['buy milk', 'write code']
Verify 2 todo items created with pending status

test_cases.title: PluginsPane renders plugin list from store
test_cases.description: Verify PluginsPane displays plugin cards with correct info
steps: Verify each card shows name, version, status badge, trust level

test_cases.title: PluginSettingsForm renders dynamic form from schema
test_cases.description: Verify form fields match manifest contributes.settings
steps: Create plugin with settings: [string, boolean, enum]
Verify Input rendered for string field
Verify Toggle rendered for boolean field
Verify Select rendered for enum field

test_cases.title: PermissionDialog shows and submits permission approval
test_cases.description: Verify permission dialog displays permissions and sends approval
steps: Verify dialog appears with permission list

test_cases.title: SlashMenu includes plugin slash commands
test_cases.description: Verify plugin slash commands appear in SlashMenu
steps: Populate PluginStore with plugin that has slashCommands

test_cases.title: MessageDecoration renders plugin tags on messages
test_cases.description: Verify decoration tags appear on matching messages
steps: Verify tag shows pluginName and text
